title: headers.rs: coap_buf fixed buffer limits CoAP payload to 252 bytes
close_reason: Fixed: Added explicit validation for CoAP tail size before copy_from_slice to prevent panic. Returns PacketError::BufferTooSmall with descriptive error when tail exceeds 252 bytes (COAP_MAX_TAIL). Added constants COAP_BUF_SIZE and COAP_MAX_TAIL for documentation, and a test for the error path.
